items.name: Crimson Fighter
items.description: Classic deep-red lacquer over the hull. The aggressive pilot's staple color.
items.flavor_text: Painted the color of warning. Wear it like a promise to the next pilot.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, clean matte finish, deep crimson red with subtle panel shading, aggressive and confident

items.name: Glacier Blue
items.description: Cold pale-blue wash with frosted edges. Favored by patrol pilots in the Outer Ring.
items.flavor_text: Ice never forgets the shape it froze around. Neither does the cockpit.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, soft satin finish, pale glacial blue with whitened panel edges, calm and clinical

items.name: Jungle Camouflage
items.description: Four-tone mottled green camouflage pattern. Older militia stencil, still effective in debris fields.
items.flavor_text: Mud, leaf, shadow, bark. Four colors to hide a thousand sins.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, mottled camouflage pattern, deep greens and browns with khaki patches, militant and earthy

items.name: Desert Tan
items.description: Dry sand beige coat with lightly scoured edges. Looks at home near rust-belt stations.
items.flavor_text: Dust doesn't stick to what it already is. Camouflage by surrender.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, weathered matte finish, warm sand tan with faint dust streaks, worn and utilitarian

items.name: Obsidian Black
items.description: Deep matte black with faint volcanic-glass shimmer when the sun hits the edges.
items.flavor_text: Some colors are hiding places. This one is a statement with the lights off.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, deep matte black, faint volcanic glass shimmer at panel edges, mysterious and refined

items.name: Arctic White
items.description: Clean arctic white, minimal weathering. The default parade paint of rescue squadrons.
items.flavor_text: White reflects every wavelength. Say everything, commit to nothing.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, clean arctic white, soft pearlescent finish, pure and ceremonial

items.name: Neon Pink
items.description: Electric hot-pink coat tuned to retinal limits. Impossible to miss, impossible to ignore.
items.flavor_text: Subtle is a luxury. This pilot chose the other one.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, vibrant hot pink, glossy finish with slight magenta bloom, loud and playful

items.name: Solar Yellow
items.description: Bright solar yellow with faint gradient wash toward the nose. Rescue-visible, station-friendly.
items.flavor_text: Painted the same shade as the last thing you see before a star.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, saturated solar yellow, gradient softening toward nose, cheerful and high-visibility

items.name: Forest Green
items.description: Deep pine green with a touch of moss at the rivets. Quiet, grounded, old-school.
items.flavor_text: Somewhere below there were trees. The hull remembers them.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, deep forest green, soft moss tint at recessed panels, grounded and nostalgic

items.name: Ocean Teal
items.description: Shifting teal finish, from seafloor green to deep cobalt across the hull length.
items.flavor_text: Depth is not a color, but it is this one. Wear it carefully.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, gradient ocean teal to deep cobalt, wet glossy look, contemplative and cool

items.name: Lavender Mist
items.description: Soft lavender wash with pale violet cloud motion when the hull moves at speed.
items.flavor_text: The color of an evening no one can quite place. Carries a mood.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, dusty lavender wash, soft violet motion-blur suggestion, dreamy and wistful

items.name: Sunset Orange
items.description: Warm sunset orange with faint purple underside. A pilot's last-call color.
items.flavor_text: Paint your ship like the sky is closing for the night. Keep flying anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, warm sunset orange top fading to dusk purple underbelly, golden hour mood

items.name: Midnight Navy
items.description: Deep navy lacquer that swallows station light. Pilot's favorite for late-cycle patrols.
items.flavor_text: Blue deep enough that the stars stop competing. They just settle on the hull.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, deep midnight navy, subtle starfield reflection in highlights, quiet and stealthy

items.name: Ash Grey
items.description: Neutral ash grey primer finish with factory stencils left intact. Cheap, honest, working-class.
items.flavor_text: The color of things that did not need to prove anything. It worked.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, industrial ash grey primer, visible factory stencils, utilitarian and honest

items.name: Rust Copper
items.description: Copper-rust gradient with verdigris creeping along the seam lines. Looks ancient from a kilometer out.
items.flavor_text: Some ships choose to age. Others are born that way.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, oxidized copper with verdigris along seams, weathered and ancient

items.name: Electric Cyan
items.description: High-voltage cyan with a faint wet-glass sheen. Reads bright on every battleboard scanner.
items.flavor_text: Every scanner in the sector learns this color the hard way.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, electric cyan with wet glass sheen, high-contrast edge lighting, vivid and modern

items.name: Magma Red
items.description: Hot magma red with darker underplate peeking through vent seams. Feels pressurized.
items.flavor_text: Heat doesn't leave. It just changes shape and waits for someone to notice.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, molten magma red with darker underplate at vents, volcanic and pressurized

items.name: Pale Gold
items.description: Brushed pale-gold finish, soft satin. The diplomatic pilot's quiet flex.
items.flavor_text: Wealth is the volume at which you speak. This hull whispers.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, brushed pale gold satin finish, understated luxury, elegant and restrained

items.name: Storm Grey
items.description: Storm grey with a faint blue undertone, like weather seen from orbit.
items.flavor_text: The color the sky goes when it knows something the ground hasn't learned yet.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, storm grey with cold blue undertone, overcast sky vibe, brooding and steady

items.name: Plum Violet
items.description: Deep plum purple with faint wine-colored highlights along the spine.
items.flavor_text: A color from a bottle no one ever reaches for in the light.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, rich plum violet with wine highlights on spine, moody and sophisticated

items.name: Moss Olive
items.description: Flat olive green with moss speckle weathering. Feels abandoned in a flattering way.
items.flavor_text: Left in the dock too long. Came out with its own weather.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, flat olive green with moss speckle weathering, quietly abandoned vibe, organic

items.name: Champagne Bronze
items.description: Warm champagne bronze with just enough sheen to catch dock lights nicely.
items.flavor_text: Celebration is a finish, not a moment. Wear it in the cockpit.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, warm champagne bronze, soft metallic sheen, celebratory and warm

items.name: Pastel Mint
items.description: Soft pastel mint finish, barely there. Pilot's quiet statement against the void.
items.flavor_text: Pastel in a place that does not forgive soft things. That is the point.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, soft pastel mint green, barely saturated, gentle and defiant

items.name: Bone White Matte
items.description: Off-white matte bone finish. Evokes salvage fleets and long-duration mission wear.
items.flavor_text: The color of things the void has rinsed clean and given back.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, bone white matte finish, slight cream undertone, salvaged and austere

items.name: Tiger Stripes
items.description: Bold black tiger stripe overlay across the wings and engine cowling. Looks angry at rest.
items.flavor_text: Stripes are a warning other pilots pretend not to read. They read.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, bold black tiger stripes on wings and cowling, high-contrast applied-decal style, aggressive

items.name: Digital Camo
items.description: Pixelated grey-on-grey digital camouflage wrap. Reads professional from any range.
items.flavor_text: A pattern designed by math to disappear. Frequently fails on purpose.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, pixelated grey-on-grey digital camouflage wrap, modern military, tactical and precise

items.name: Carbon Weave
items.description: Exposed carbon-fiber weave panels with clear lacquer topcoat. Feels light just to look at.
items.flavor_text: Lightweight as a lie, stronger than most promises. Composite philosophy.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, exposed carbon fiber weave under clear lacquer, dark charcoal with chrome highlights, technical

items.name: Racing Stripes Red
items.description: Twin red racing stripes along the full hull length. Classic speed runner silhouette.
items.flavor_text: Two lines. One direction. The pilot had opinions about subtlety.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, twin red racing stripes full hull length, crisp edges, classic motorsport, energetic

items.name: Racing Stripes Blue
items.description: Twin cobalt blue racing stripes running nose to tailfin. Fleet-favorite speedrun look.
items.flavor_text: Blue for the pilot who finishes first and complains about the paperwork.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, twin cobalt blue racing stripes nose to tail, crisp edges, competitive and clean

items.name: Skull Nose Art
items.description: Classic hand-painted grinning skull on the nose. Works at every scanner resolution.
items.flavor_text: Every kill, a little more teeth. The nose remembers them all.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, hand-painted grinning skull nose art, chipped and weathered, classic wartime pinup style

items.name: Flame Decal
items.description: Orange-to-yellow licking flame decals running from cockpit to engine. Pure attitude.
items.flavor_text: The flames were added after the third near-miss. Purely cosmetic, mostly.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, orange-to-yellow licking flame decals cockpit to engine, hot rod style, bold and loud

items.name: Arrow Decal
items.description: Clean geometric arrows pointing forward along the fuselage. Implied motion at rest.
items.flavor_text: The arrows always point to where the pilot already decided to go.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, clean geometric forward-pointing arrows along fuselage, minimalist vector style, purposeful

items.name: Hexagon Pattern
items.description: Fine hexagonal mesh overlay across the hull. Looks technical, scans clean.
items.flavor_text: Geometry for its own sake. Engineers called it pretty, then denied it.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, fine hexagonal mesh pattern across hull, subtle opacity, tech-grid aesthetic, precise

items.name: Wave Pattern
items.description: Flowing wave-line decal that runs along the hull like slow water. Strangely calming.
items.flavor_text: The hull moves in straight lines. The decal insists on curves.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, flowing wave line pattern along hull, smooth curves, calming and fluid

items.name: Circuit Board Texture
items.description: Full-hull circuit-board trace paint, green substrate with copper trace lines. Almost living.
items.flavor_text: Built to look like what runs inside it. Honesty in paint.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, circuit board trace pattern, green PCB substrate with copper traces, technical and alive

items.name: Shark Teeth Nose Art
items.description: Aggressive white-and-red shark teeth painted around the nose intake. Old-war throwback.
items.flavor_text: Painted by a pilot who did not come back. Kept anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, white and red shark teeth around nose intake, vintage military nose art, menacing

items.name: Reaper Skull Decal
items.description: Hooded reaper skull emblem on each wing. Black scythe curve reinforces the hull line.
items.flavor_text: Reapers keep lists. The hull is a page.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, hooded reaper skull emblem on each wing with black scythe motif, gothic and grim

items.name: Dragon Scale Overlay
items.description: Full-hull emerald dragon-scale texture with subtle iridescent green highlights along each scale.
items.flavor_text: Scaled like a thing that refused to be extinct. The pilot took note.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, emerald dragon scale texture, subtle iridescent green highlights, mythic and organic

items.name: Racing Stripes Gold
items.description: Twin gold racing stripes over a dark underpaint. Champion-lap look without the leaderboard.
items.flavor_text: Gold stripes on a ship that has not yet won. Aspirational paint is honest.
items.art_prompt_hints: ship decal overlay, twin gold racing stripes on dark substrate, metallic gold highlights, prestigious and clean

items.name: Panel Line Highlight
items.description: Neutral base coat with every panel seam highlighted in contrasting paint. Reads sculpted.
items.flavor_text: The ship was always this shape. The paint is just telling on it.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, neutral grey base coat with every panel seam highlighted in dark contrast, hobbyist detailed

items.name: Chrome Cruiser Plating
items.description: High-polish chrome plating across every panel. Reflects the hangar back at itself.
items.flavor_text: A hull that shows you your own face before it shows you anything else.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, high-polish chrome mirror plating, environment reflections baked in, ostentatious and clean

items.name: Holographic Shift Shell
items.description: Holographic foil wrap that shifts cyan to magenta as the ship rotates against light.
items.flavor_text: A color that refuses to commit. Pilot and hull in quiet agreement.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, holographic foil wrap, cyan to magenta angular shift, iridescent and dynamic

items.name: Iridescent Nebula Paint
items.description: Iridescent paint that scatters nebula-purple and teal across the hull as it moves.
items.flavor_text: Carries a small nebula on the shoulders. Pretends not to notice.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, iridescent paint scattering, nebula purple and teal hue shift, cosmic and fluid

items.name: Bio-Luminescent Hull
items.description: Living-coral aesthetic hull with pulsing cyan bio-luminescent vents along the seams.
items.flavor_text: Grown, not painted. Cold-blooded and still somehow warm to the scanners.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, bio-luminescent coral texture, pulsing cyan seam vents, deep sea alien organic glow

items.name: Void-Absorbing Matte
items.description: Ultra-matte black that eats station light. Silhouette only, no highlights, no forgiveness.
items.flavor_text: Black enough that the eye stops trying. The pilot prefers it that way.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, ultra-matte vantablack finish, zero highlights, silhouette-only read, ominous and stealthy

items.name: Starlight Weave
items.description: Dark hull threaded with tiny points of white light arranged like a sky map.
items.flavor_text: Forty thousand pinpricks of sky, sewn into steel. Wear a constellation.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, dark base with tiny white star-field points as constellations, celestial and sewn-in

items.name: Liquid Mercury Finish
items.description: Reflective liquid-metal finish with slow blobby flow lines captured along panel seams.
items.flavor_text: Solid at speed, liquid at rest. The hull keeps its own counsel.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, liquid mercury chrome finish, slow blobby flow along seams, alien metallic

items.name: Prismatic Chameleon Skin
items.description: Chameleon paint that shifts through full spectrum based on view angle and speed.
items.flavor_text: Wears whatever color the moment demands. The moment is always demanding.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, prismatic chameleon shift across full spectrum, velocity-reactive gradient, playful and alive

items.name: Oil Slick Iridescence
items.description: Black base with oily rainbow film swirling across the hull in unpredictable patterns.
items.flavor_text: Refined from something that was once a mess. Some colors are that way.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, black base with oil slick rainbow film swirl, petrol sheen, dirty elegance

items.name: Fractured Glass Hull
items.description: Hull that appears cracked with tinted glass, light scattering through every fault line.
items.flavor_text: Broken, held together, faster for it. A hull that flies on its own history.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, fractured stained-glass look with light scatter through fault lines, fragile and beautiful

items.name: Aurora Ripple Paint
items.description: Northern-lights paint wave that ripples down the hull from nose to engine cone.
items.flavor_text: Weather from a planet neither of you has visited. It got on the hull anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, aurora ribbon wave nose to tail, green violet pink gradient, sky-phenomenon mood

items.name: Plasma Vein Tracery
items.description: Dark hull with glowing magenta plasma veins running like a circulatory system.
items.flavor_text: The veins are decorative, the implication is not. Something inside is running hot.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, dark base with glowing magenta plasma veins as circulatory network, biomechanical menace

items.name: Crystalline Shell
items.description: Faceted crystal shell finish with interior refraction and faint internal sparkle lines.
items.flavor_text: The hull was grown, one facet at a time. The pilot waited.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, faceted crystalline shell, interior refraction glints, gemstone sculptural quality

items.name: Mirror Mirage Coat
items.description: Heat-mirage shimmer over a mirror base. The hull looks blurred even standing still.
items.flavor_text: Always arriving, never quite here. The scanner reports uncertainty and moves on.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, mirror base under heat mirage shimmer, wavy distortion, elusive and liminal

items.name: Obsidian Stealth Coating
items.description: Volcanic-obsidian stealth coat that bleeds thin violet edge light at panel seams.
items.flavor_text: The hull drinks light and keeps a little of it for later. Warm violet.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, obsidian stealth black with thin violet seam glow, volcanic glass, dangerous and premium

items.name: Ion Corona Casing
items.description: Dark hull wrapped in a faint ion corona, static discharge arcing across raised panels.
items.flavor_text: Arcs are cosmetic. The pilot is not. Everyone within a kilometer already knows.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, dark hull wrapped in ion corona, tesla arcs along raised panels, electric dangerous aura

items.name: Quantum Ripple Finish
items.description: Surface that appears to ripple with quantum noise. Reality slightly glitched around the edges.
items.flavor_text: Observers report the hull is not always where it says it is. Mostly is.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, surface rippling with quantum noise, subtle dimensional glitch at silhouette edges, unreal and high-tech

items.name: Prismatic Dragon Scale
items.description: Layered dragon-scale plates with prismatic edge refraction along every scale border.
items.flavor_text: Scaled like a thing old enough to have watched stars choose their names.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, layered dragon scale plates with prismatic edge refraction, mythic iridescent, regal

items.name: Molten Core Hull
items.description: Dark charred hull with bright molten-orange cracks radiating heat from the interior outward.
items.flavor_text: Cooled on the outside. Not on the inside. Not yet, not ever.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, charred black outer with bright molten orange cracks, volcanic core breach, dangerous heat

items.name: Celestial Cartographer Hull
items.description: Full-hull animated star map etched into brass plating, constellations slowly drifting as the ship banks.
items.flavor_text: A map to nowhere specific, slowly rewriting itself depending on where the pilot looks.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, animated star-map etched into brass plating, constellations drifting with ship bank, scholarly ornate

items.name: Shadowglass Plating
items.description: Smoked translucent glass plating with dark interior machinery faintly visible through each panel.
items.flavor_text: The ship lets you look in. Not far, not long. Enough.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, smoked translucent glass plating with faintly visible interior machinery, moody transparent

items.name: Nebula Veil Hull
items.description: Hull wrapped in a translucent nebula veil — pink and cyan gas drifting across the panels.
items.flavor_text: A nebula agreed to ride along for a while. It has not agreed to leave.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, translucent nebula veil wrap, pink and cyan gas drift across panels, cosmic drifting mood

items.name: Voidrunner Legendary Hull
items.description: Signature Voidrunner hull with animated star-map etching across every plate and a reactor halo at rest.
items.flavor_text: One of nine hulls ever issued. Each pilot earned theirs. Nobody asks how.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, signature animated star-map etching on dark polished panels with reactor halo, legendary prestige

items.name: Phoenix Rising Hull
items.description: Crimson-gold phoenix feather plating with animated ember embers drifting off the trailing edge.
items.flavor_text: The hull burned once. The hull kept the shape of the fire and wore it.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, crimson gold phoenix feather plating with drifting ember particle trail, mythic fire

items.name: Ancient Relic Restoration
items.description: Restored pre-voidexa relic hull with bronze plates, etched alien glyphs, and patinated copper seams.
items.flavor_text: Older than most stations. The hull remembers captains the records do not.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, restored ancient relic bronze plating with etched alien glyphs and patinated copper seams, archaeological reverent

items.name: Singularity Echo
items.description: Reality-bending shader that shimmers with quantum noise and bends starlight around the hull silhouette.
items.flavor_text: The hull leaves a faint afterimage. Space has not yet agreed it was there.
items.art_prompt_hints: starfighter hull full paint, reality-bending quantum noise shader with starlight gravitational lensing along silhouette, mythic unreal

items.name: Blue Ion Trail
items.description: Classic cool-blue ion trail off the main engine. Sharp edge, clean taper.
items.flavor_text: The color every pilot learns to fly by, whether they planned to or not.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, cool electric blue ion plume, sharp edged clean taper, crisp and clinical

items.name: Red Plasma Trail
items.description: Hot crimson plasma exhaust with flickering core and soft red halo at the edges.
items.flavor_text: The trail arrives at the next pilot's scanners before the ship does. Unfortunate.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, hot crimson plasma with flickering core and soft red halo, aggressive and fiery

items.name: Green Acid Trail
items.description: Sickly acid-green exhaust with a bubbly particle texture. Reads as a warning.
items.flavor_text: Not actually corrosive. The hull insists. Nobody chooses to fly through.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, acid green plume with bubbly particle texture, toxic warning aesthetic, sinister

items.name: Purple Void Trail
items.description: Deep purple plasma trail with starfield-like inner shimmer. Quiet on the scanners.
items.flavor_text: Purple for the pilot who leaves politely. The hull thanks you anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, deep purple plasma with starfield inner shimmer, quiet and cosmic

items.name: White Starlight Trail
items.description: Pure white exhaust shot through with tiny flickering star-points. Almost ceremonial.
items.flavor_text: A wake of tiny suns that stops existing the moment the pilot looks back.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, pure white plume with tiny flickering star-point particles, ceremonial and clean

items.name: Yellow Solar Trail
items.description: Bright solar-yellow exhaust with a thin orange flame edge. Cheerful in the cockpit mirror.
items.flavor_text: The color of a sun that has not yet decided to be cruel. Travel now.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, bright solar yellow plume with thin orange flame edge, warm cheerful

items.name: Orange Flame Trail
items.description: Classic orange flame exhaust with ragged rolling particle edges. Pure engine-room honesty.
items.flavor_text: An honest flame. It does what flames do, nothing more, nothing clever.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, classic orange flame with ragged rolling particle edges, combustion honest retro

items.name: Cyan Comet Trail
items.description: Comet-style cyan plume with a bright head and long fading tail. Graceful at speed.
items.flavor_text: Mistaken for a comet twice. The scanners learned, eventually. Mostly.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, cyan comet plume with bright head and long fading tail, graceful astronomical

items.name: Magenta Sparkle Trail
items.description: Hot magenta exhaust with embedded glitter-sparkle points that linger half a second.
items.flavor_text: Sparkle is harder to take seriously. The pilot counts on it.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, hot magenta plume with embedded glitter sparkle points lingering, festive and cheeky

items.name: Silver Dust Trail
items.description: Fine silver particulate exhaust that hangs in space briefly before dissolving. Understated.
items.flavor_text: A trail that acts like it is embarrassed to exist. Embarrassed and useful.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, fine silver particulate plume that hangs briefly before dissolving, understated metallic

items.name: Crimson Cinder Trail
items.description: Deep crimson exhaust with embedded drifting cinder particles. Looks dangerous in a still frame.
items.flavor_text: Cinders that fly out and forget to land. They always had somewhere to be.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, deep crimson plume with drifting cinder particles, dangerous dying-fire mood

items.name: Teal Bubble Trail
items.description: Light teal plasma with slow rising bubble particles. A friendlier engine signature.
items.flavor_text: Underwater physics, zero gravity manners. The engine is having a nice day.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, light teal plasma with slow rising bubble particles, friendly and buoyant

items.name: Amber Ember Trail
items.description: Warm amber exhaust speckled with slow-cooling ember embers drifting outward from the engine.
items.flavor_text: Warmth the hull is letting go of. The pilot pretends not to miss it.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, warm amber plume speckled with slow cooling embers, hearth-warm and patient

items.name: Lime Pulse Trail
items.description: Bright lime-green exhaust with a rhythmic pulse, like the engine is breathing.
items.flavor_text: The engine inhales, the trail exhales. Neither party consulted the pilot.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, bright lime green plume with rhythmic pulsing, breathing quality, energetic

items.name: Nebula Wake
items.description: Slow-rolling nebula gas trail in pink and cyan, leaving a wide dispersing cloud behind.
items.flavor_text: A small weather system tagging along. It leaves when the engine cools.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, slow rolling nebula gas, pink and cyan dispersing cloud, atmospheric and cosmic

items.name: Solar Flare Trail
items.description: Intense solar-flare exhaust with arc loops and bright yellow-white core. Reads loud on every scanner.
items.flavor_text: Borrowed the behavior of a star. The star has not asked for it back.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, solar flare plume with arc loops and bright yellow-white core, stellar phenomenon, intense

items.name: Cosmic Ribbon
items.description: Thin ribbon-like exhaust that curls and braids as the ship turns, tracing the flight path.
items.flavor_text: A signature written in space. It fades before anyone gets around to reading it.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, thin ribbon curling and braiding with turns, iridescent trace, graceful and elegant

items.name: Ion Storm Trail
items.description: Ion-storm exhaust with forked lightning arcs branching out from the central plume.
items.flavor_text: The ion storm had nowhere to go. The engine offered a ride, briefly.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, ion plume with forked lightning arcs branching outward, electric tempest, dangerous

items.name: Reactor Glow Purple
items.description: Deep purple reactor-core glow visible through the engine intake vents at all speeds.
items.flavor_text: The reactor glows the color the engineer dreamed about. Approved on the second submission.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, deep violet purple, emissive with soft bloom, sci-fi interior tech

items.name: Reactor Glow Green
items.description: Toxic-green reactor glow through the vents and intake ports. Warning color, worn proudly.
items.flavor_text: Green reactors are illegal in twelve sectors. Seven of those will never find out.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, toxic radioactive green, emissive with soft bloom, hazardous mood

items.name: Reactor Glow White
items.description: Pure white reactor glow visible through the vents. Intensifies during boost, dim at cruise.
items.flavor_text: The reactor runs hot and honest. Nothing is pretending in there.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, pure white-hot incandescence, emissive bloom, technical and powerful

items.name: Reactor Glow Cyan
items.description: Cold cyan reactor glow with thin frost-like filaments webbing outward from the vent grates.
